mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT( 'REQ_', LPAD( COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(T.REQ_ID, 5, 16) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 16, '0' ) ) AS REQ_ID FROM ( SELECT REQ_ID FROM ARTAPPM UNION ALL SELECT REQ_ID FROM ARTAPPS ) T
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ARTAPPS WHERE PRO_ID = #{proId} AND STTUS_CODE IN ('03', '04')
mapper.update: UPDATE ARTAPPS SET PRO_GBN = #{proGbn}, PRO_GBN_ETC = COALESCE(#{proGbnEtc}, ''), REQ_SUB = #{reqSub}, JOIN_CNT = #{joinCnt}, BEF_JOIN = #{befJoin}, JOIN_TIME = #{joinTime}, JOIN_TIME_CON = #{joinTimeCon}, S_UNDER = COALESCE(#{sUnder}, ''), S_TARGET = COALESCE(#{sTarget}, ''), S_CHAR = COALESCE(#{sChar}, ''), S_REASON = #{sReason}, S_EXPECT = #{sExpect}, S_APPR = #{sAppr}, S_COMM = COALESCE(#{sComm}, ''), AGREE1_YN = COALESCE(#{agree1Yn}, 'N'), AGREE2_YN = COALESCE(#{agree2Yn}, 'N'), AGREE3_YN = COALESCE(#{agree3Yn}, 'N'), STTUS_CODE = #{sttusCode}, CHG_USER_ID = #{UNIQ_ID}, CHG_DATE = NOW() WHERE REQ_ID = #{reqId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ARTAPPM M INNER JOIN ARTAPPS S ON M.REQ_ID = S.REQ_ID LEFT JOIN ARMUSER U ON M.C_ESNTL_ID = U.ESNTL_ID WHERE M.PRO_ID = #{searchProId}
AND DECRYPT(U.USER_NM) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchUserNm}, '%')
